## Checklist

- [ ] Commits are DCO signed-off (`Signed-off-by:`)
- [ ] Tests updated for behavior changes
- [ ] Docs updated if user-facing
- [ ] Model version bump considered (major / minor / patch, see CONTRIBUTING.md)
